final:
module top_module(
	input         clk,
	input         we3,
	input  [4:0]  ra1, ra2, wa3,
	input  [31:0] wd3,
	output [31:0] rd1, rd2
);reg [31:0] registers[31:0];

	always @(posedge clk)
		if (we3) begin
			registers[wa3] <= wd3;
		end

	assign rd1 = (ra1 != 0) ? registers[ra1] : 0;
	assign rd2 = (ra2 != 0) ? registers[ra2] : 0;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
